sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58224" key="knu/za3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κνύζᾰ</orth> (C), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corrupt, wrinkled</tr_>, cited from <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> </bibl> by Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:2:901" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.901</biblScope> </bibl>; cf.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κνυζός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
